description: Create a multi-file Talon tag system for 'presentation mode' in the directory %APPDATA%\Talon\user\presentation_mode. The system must include a Python module named presentation_mode.py that registers a 'user.presentation_mode' tag and defines actions to toggle it by modifying ctx.tags. A global Talon file named presentation_toggle.talon (without a context header) must provide the commands 'presentation mode on' and 'presentation mode off' to trigger the toggle actions. A context-gated Talon file named presentation_commands.talon (starting with the header 'tag: user.presentation_mode' followed by a line with '-') must implement commands for 'next slide' (right), 'previous slide' (left), 'first slide' (home), 'last slide' (end), 'blank screen' (b), 'start presentation' (f5), and 'end presentation' (escape).
